potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall stop immediately if the door is opened during cooking for safety reasons.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When the door is closed, the user can open it at any time.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to open the door whenever it is closed.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start cooking the food when the user initiates the microwave and continue until the set time is completed.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is already covered by 'The system shall require the user to enter cooking time after the door is closed.' and 'The system shall stop immediately if the door is opened during cooking for safety reasons.'
